mainEntity.name: Process to track AI referral sources for Houston firms?
mainEntity.text: Process to track AI referral sources for Houston firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use Google Analytics UTM for AI queries, Search Console for impressions, monitor Perplexity/ChatGPT outputs weekly.[2][3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Tag links from AI cites. Query AIs incognito monthly. Tools like Ahrefs track mentions. Houston: geo-filter. Reveals gaps. Free/basic sufficient. Opponents hide sources.[2]

name: Track AI Referrals in Houston
